blocks.text: Match preview: Bangladesh face Australia in 3rd ODI (ODI) on Sun, 14 Jun, 2026, 10:30 am at Shere Bangla National Stadium Dhaka. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Slow, low bounce; spinners key in middle overs. Turn increases under lights.
Thunderstorm · High 33°C / Low 27°C · Rain: 2.4 mm · Wind: up to 13 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
